category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Mongolian market (MASM certification regime).

title.en: China-to-Mongolia LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入蒙古：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入蒙古：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Mongolian market-access requirements — MASM (Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology) certification, MNS/IEC 60598, 62560 and 62471 adopted standards, energy programmes, and CRC radio approval for wireless luminaires — versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Mongolia operates a national regime and is not an EAEU member.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与蒙古市场准入要求对照——MASM（蒙古标准计量局）认证、MNS/IEC 60598、62560 及 62471 采标、能源计划，以及无线灯具的 CRC 无线电核准——并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。蒙古采用国家制度，并非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與蒙古市場准入要求對照——MASM（蒙古標準計量局）認證、MNS/IEC 60598、62560 及 62471 採標、能源計劃，以及無線燈具的 CRC 無線電核准——並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。蒙古採用國家制度，並非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Mongolian law, MASM technical regulations, the applicable MNS/IEC adopted standards, energy programme requirements, and importer-registration obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement. Mongolia is a landlocked national regulatory regime (not EAEU); requirements may differ from neighbouring jurisdictions.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行蒙古法律、MASM 技术法规、适用的 MNS/IEC 采标、能源计划要求及进口商登记义务。蒙古为内陆国家监管制度（非欧亚经济联盟成员），其要求可能与邻近司法管辖区不同。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行蒙古法律、MASM 技術法規、適用的 MNS/IEC 採標、能源計劃要求及進口商登記義務。蒙古為內陸國家監管制度（非歐亞經濟聯盟成員），其要求可能與鄰近司法管轄區不同。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Mongolia generally works through a registered in-country importer and obtains MASM (Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology) conformity certification for regulated products against Mongolian national standards (MNS), many of which adopt IEC standards such as MNS/IEC 60598 (luminaire safety), MNS/IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps), and MNS/IEC 62471 (photobiological safety). Mongolia's grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz — the same nominal voltage and frequency as China, so no electrical re-design is needed for voltage compatibility. Energy efficiency may be addressed through Mongolian energy-efficiency programmes rather than a single binding minimum-efficacy regulation; verify current programme scope. There is no horizontal RoHS-type hazardous-substance restriction equivalent to the EU in Mongolia (and Mongolia is NOT an EAEU member, so EAEU TR rules do not apply); China's GB/T 26572 and China RoHS 2 disclosure labelling are the manufacturer's existing baseline. Wireless/smart luminaires require radio type approval from the Communications Regulatory Commission (CRC). CCC certification obtained for China is not recognised for Mongolian market access — separate MASM conformity assessment applies. Confirm the exact certified-product list, certification route, and importer obligations with MASM before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 向蒙古出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商通常通过已登记的在地进口商运作，并就受管制产品按蒙古国家标准（MNS）取得 MASM（蒙古标准计量局）合格认证；许多 MNS 采用 IEC 标准，如 MNS/IEC 60598（灯具安全）、MNS/IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）及 MNS/IEC 62471（光生物安全）。蒙古电网为 220/380 V、50 Hz——与中国标称电压和频率相同，因此电压兼容性无需重新设计。能效可能通过蒙古能效计划处理，而非单一具约束力的最低能效法规；请核查现行计划范围。蒙古不存在与欧盟相当的横向 RoHS 类有害物质限制（且蒙古并非欧亚经济联盟成员，故 EAEU 技术法规不适用）；中国 GB/T 26572 及中国 RoHS 2 披露标识是制造商的现有基线。无线/智能灯具须取得通信监管委员会（CRC）的无线电型号核准。为中国取得的 CCC 认证不被蒙古市场准入所认可——须另行进行 MASM 合格评定。出货前请与 MASM 确认确切的认证产品清单、认证路径及进口商义务。
answer_first.zht: 向蒙古出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商通常通過已登記的在地進口商運作，並就受管制產品按蒙古國家標準（MNS）取得 MASM（蒙古標準計量局）合格認證；許多 MNS 採用 IEC 標準，如 MNS/IEC 60598（燈具安全）、MNS/IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）及 MNS/IEC 62471（光生物安全）。蒙古電網為 220/380 V、50 Hz——與中國標稱電壓和頻率相同，因此電壓兼容性無需重新設計。能效可能通過蒙古能效計劃處理，而非單一具約束力的最低能效法規；請核查現行計劃範圍。蒙古不存在與歐盟相當的橫向 RoHS 類有害物質限制（且蒙古並非歐亞經濟聯盟成員，故 EAEU 技術法規不適用）；中國 GB/T 26572 及中國 RoHS 2 披露標識是製造商的現有基線。無線/智能燈具須取得通信監管委員會（CRC）的無線電型號核准。為中國取得的 CCC 認證不被蒙古市場准入所認可——須另行進行 MASM 合格評定。出貨前請與 MASM 確認確切的認證產品清單、認證路徑及進口商義務。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Mongolian regulator (MASM, CRC), Mongolian national standard (MNS), adopted IEC reference, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted. Mongolian-language primary sources should be confirmed by a qualified local professional.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. MASM certified-product scope, MNS adoption status of IEC standards, and energy programme thresholds must be re-verified against current MASM/CRC guidance on each review cycle.
